name: Cryotra
description: Fires volleys of icy grenades that inflict a lingering chill on the blast zone.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: Fires volleys of icy grenades that inflict a lingering chill on the blast zone.

components.name: Charamote Sagan Module
components.description:
A device used to reconstruct degenerated matter into Orokin bio-material.

Source: Dismantled from Charamote servofish via The Business in Fortuna (Venus). Catch Charamote in Orb Vallis cave hotspots during any weather. Also drops from the Exploiter Orb in the Orb Vallis.

components.name: Esher Devar
components.description:
Polished and cut to perfection.

Blueprint sold by Old Man Suumbaat in Cetus on Earth.

components.name: Eye-Eye Rotoblade
components.description:
A machine element used to propel robotic organisms through coolant.

Source: Dismantled from Eye-Eye servofish via The Business in Fortuna (Venus). Catch Eye-Eye in Orb Vallis ponds during Warm weather. Also drops from resource containers across the Orb Vallis.

components.name: Heart Noctrul
components.description:
Polished and cut to perfection.

Blueprint sold by Smokefinger in Fortuna on Venus.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.1.3 + 24.1.3.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Cryotra only firing at targets within its firing range.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.0.10
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the incorrect Foundry rush costs for Cryotra, Tazicor, and Vulcax weapons.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.0.2
patchlogs.changes: Removed the Cryotra from being able to have Glaxion Rivens equipped. Sentinel weapons no longer generate Rivens as noted in Update 24.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Update 24.0
patchlogs.changes: Cryotra: Emits a ray of sub-zero energy.
